---
title: "Meta-Analysis Univariate Model"
output: html_document
date: "2024-10-31"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(metafor)
library(meta)
library(mgcv)
library(grid)
library(forestplot)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

## Interactive Effect

### Meta-Regression

```{r}
uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul <- read.csv("../Results/Chile_interaction_cumul.csv")
uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul <- uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul[,-1]
```

```{r}
full_data <- read.csv("../Data/Chile Data.csv")
(annual_data <- full_data %>% group_by(Region) %>% summarize(PM2.5=mean(PM2.5),PM10=mean(PM10),
                                                            NO2=mean(NO2),O3=mean(O3),
                                                            AverageTemperature=mean(Avg.Temp),MaximumTemperature=mean(Max.Temp),
                                                            MinimumTemperature=mean(Min.Temp),Precipitation=mean(Prcp),
                                                            RelativeHumidity=mean(RH),
                                                            WindSpeed=mean(WS)))
```

```{r}
meta_regression_moderator <- function(main_factor,moderator,dataset){
  moderator <- as.formula(paste0("~",moderator))
  metareg <- rma(yi=log(Est.Lag3),sei = SE / Est.Lag3,mods=moderator,
                 data=dataset[dataset$Factor==main_factor,],method="REML")
  result <- summary(metareg)
  result_df <- c(Coefficients = round(result$beta[2,1],4),SE = round(result$se[2],4),
                 Z_value = round(result$zval[2],4),
                 P_value = round(result$pval[2],4),CI = paste0("(",round(result$ci.lb[2],4),"-",round(result$ci.ub[2],4),")"))
  return(result_df)
}
```

```{r}
joint_event <-  c("p10_p95_2d",
                  "p05_p90_2d","p075_p90_2d","p10_p90_2d",
                  "p05_p80_2d","p075_p80_2d","p10_p80_2d",
                  "p05_p70_2d","p075_p70_2d","p10_p70_2d")
moderator <- c("PM2.5","PM10","NO2","O3","AverageTemperature","Precipitation","RelativeHumidity","WindSpeed")
```

```{r}
uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul_reg <- merge(uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul,annual_data,by="Region")
```

```{r}
metareg_result_joint_event_pop <- matrix(NA,ncol=5,nrow=10*8)
rowname_joint_event <- list(NULL)

for (i in 1:10){
  for (j in 1:8){
    index <- (i-1)*8+j
    metareg_result_joint_event_pop[index,] <- meta_regression_moderator(main_factor=joint_event[i],
                                                                    moderator=moderator[j],
                                                                    dataset=uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul_reg)
    rowname <- paste0(joint_event[i],":",moderator[j])
    rowname_joint_event <- c(rowname_joint_event,rowname)
  }
}
```

```{r}
metareg_result_joint_event_pop <- metareg_result_joint_event_pop %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(metareg_result_joint_event_pop) <- c("estimate","se","zval","pval","95% CI")
rownames(metareg_result_joint_event_pop) <- unlist(rowname_joint_event)
metareg_result_joint_event_pop
```

```{r}
metareg_result_joint_event_pop[metareg_result_joint_event_pop$pval<=0.05,]
```

### Meta-Analysis

```{r}
meta_analysis_overall <- function(main_factor,dataset){
   meta_analysis <- metagen(TE = log(Est.Lag3),
                           seTE = SE / Est.Lag3,
                           studlab = Region,
                           data = dataset[dataset$Factor == main_factor, ],
                           sm = "RR",
                           common = FALSE,
                           random = TRUE,
                           method.tau = "REML",
                           control = list(stepadj = 0.2))
  return(c(exp(meta_analysis$TE.random),exp(meta_analysis$lower.random),exp(meta_analysis$upper.random),meta_analysis$pval.Q))
}
```

```{r}
overall_meta_result_interaction <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=10)
for (i in 1:10){
  overall_meta_result_interaction[i,] <- meta_analysis_overall(main_factor=joint_event[i],dataset=uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul)
}
overall_meta_result_interaction <- overall_meta_result_interaction %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(overall_meta_result_interaction) <- c("smd","ci.lb","ci.ub","pval")
rownames(overall_meta_result_interaction) <- unique(overall_meta_result_interaction$Factor)
overall_meta_result_interaction
```

### Subgroup Meta-Analysis

```{r}
lonlat <- read.csv("../Data/Chile LonLat.csv")
lonlat <- lonlat %>% mutate(Natural_Area2=ifelse(Latitude>-35,"North","South"))
lonlat <- lonlat %>% mutate(Natural_Area3=ifelse(Latitude>-30,"North",
                                        ifelse((Latitude>-35)&(-30>Latitude),"Central","South")))
lonlat
```

```{r}
colnames(lonlat) <- c("Region","Latitude","Longitude","GDP","2 Area","3 Area")
lonlat <- lonlat %>% mutate(Region=ifelse(Region=="BioBio","Biobio",
                                          ifelse(Region=="O'Higgins","O.Higgins",Region)))
```

```{r}
univariate_st_pop_interaction_result3 <- merge(uni_joint_cold_spell_pm25_cumul_reg,lonlat,by="Region")
univariate_st_pop_interaction_result3$`3 Area` <- factor(univariate_st_pop_interaction_result3$`3 Area`,levels=c("North","Central","South"))
univariate_st_pop_interaction_result3
```

```{r}
subgroup_climate <- function(main_factor,dataset){
  meta_analysis <- metagen(TE = log(Est.Lag3),
                           seTE = SE / Est.Lag3,
                           studlab = Region,
                           data = dataset[dataset$Factor == main_factor, ],
                           sm = "RR", 
                           common = FALSE,
                           random = TRUE,
                           method.tau = "REML")
  meta_analysis_subgroup <- update(meta_analysis, 
                                   subgroup = dataset[dataset$Factor==main_factor,"3 Area"],tau.common = FALSE)
  result <- t(rbind(round(exp(meta_analysis_subgroup$TE.random.w),2),round(exp(meta_analysis_subgroup$lower.random.w),2),
                    round(exp(meta_analysis_subgroup$upper.random.w),2),round(meta_analysis_subgroup$I2.w,2)))
  result <- cbind(result,paste0("(",round(exp(meta_analysis_subgroup$lower.random.w),2),",",round(exp(meta_analysis_subgroup$upper.random.w),2),")"))
  result <- cbind(result,c(NA,NA,meta_analysis_subgroup$pval.Q.b.random))
  return(result)
}
```

```{r,warning=FALSE}
Climate_meta_result_joint_effect <- matrix(NA,ncol=6,nrow=10*3)
for (i in 1:10){
   Climate_meta_result_joint_effect[((i-1)*3+1):(i*3),] <- subgroup_climate(main_factor=joint_event[i],dataset=univariate_st_pop_interaction_result3)
}
Climate_meta_result_joint_effect <- Climate_meta_result_joint_effect %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(Climate_meta_result_joint_effect) <- c("smd","ci.lb","ci.ub","I2","RR(95% CI)","pval")
rownames(Climate_meta_result_joint_effect) <- c(paste(joint_event[1]," Q", 1:3, sep=""),paste(joint_event[2]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(joint_event[3]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(joint_event[4]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(joint_event[5]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(joint_event[6]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(joint_event[7]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(joint_event[8]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(joint_event[9]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(joint_event[10]," Q",1:3, sep=""))
Climate_meta_result_joint_effect
```

## RERI

### Overall Meta-Analysis

```{r}
RERI_matrix <- read.csv("../Results/Chile_RERI.csv")
RERI_matrix <- RERI_matrix[,-1] %>% as.data.frame()
RERI_event <- unique(RERI_matrix$Factor)[-1]
```

```{r}
meta_analysis_RERI <- function(main_factor,dataset){
   meta_analysis <- metagen(TE = RERI,
                           seTE = SE,
                           studlab = Region,
                           data = dataset[dataset$Factor == main_factor, ],
                           sm = "MD", 
                           common = FALSE,
                           random = TRUE,
                           method.tau = "REML",
                           control = list(stepadj = 0.2))
  return(c(meta_analysis$TE.random,meta_analysis$lower.random,meta_analysis$upper.random,meta_analysis$pval.Q))
}
```

```{r}
overall_meta_result_RERI<- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=10)
for (i in 1:10){
  overall_meta_result_RERI[i,] <- meta_analysis_RERI(main_factor=RERI_event[i],dataset=RERI_matrix)
}
overall_meta_result_RERI <- overall_meta_result_RERI %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(overall_meta_result_RERI) <- c("smd","ci.lb","ci.ub","pval")
rownames(overall_meta_result_RERI) <- RERI_event
overall_meta_result_RERI
```

### Subgroup Meta-Analysis

```{r}
RERI_matrix_lat <- merge(RERI_matrix,lonlat,by="Region")
RERI_matrix_lat$`3 Area` <- factor(RERI_matrix_lat$`3 Area`,levels=c("North","Central","South"))
RERI_matrix_lat
```

```{r}
subgroup_climate <- function(main_factor,dataset){
  meta_analysis <-metagen(TE = RERI,
                           seTE = SE,
                           studlab = Region,
                           data = dataset[dataset$Factor == main_factor, ],
                           sm = "MD", 
                           common = FALSE,
                           random = TRUE,
                           method.tau = "REML",
                           control = list(stepadj = 0.2))
  meta_analysis_subgroup <- update(meta_analysis, 
                                   subgroup = dataset[dataset$Factor==main_factor,"3 Area"],tau.common = FALSE)
  result <- t(rbind(round(meta_analysis_subgroup$TE.random.w,2),round(meta_analysis_subgroup$lower.random.w,2),
                    round(meta_analysis_subgroup$upper.random.w,2),round(meta_analysis_subgroup$I2.w,2)))
  result <- cbind(result,paste0("(",round(meta_analysis_subgroup$lower.random.w,2),",",round(meta_analysis_subgroup$upper.random.w,2),")"))
  result <- cbind(result,c(rep(NA,length(meta_analysis_subgroup$TE.random.w)-1),meta_analysis_subgroup$pval.Q.b.random))
  return(result)
}
```

```{r,warning=FALSE}
Climate_meta_result_RERI <- matrix(NA,ncol=6,nrow=10*3)
for (i in 1:10){
   Climate_meta_result_RERI[((i-1)*3+1):(i*3),] <- subgroup_climate(main_factor=RERI_event[i],dataset=RERI_matrix_lat)
}
Climate_meta_result_RERI <- Climate_meta_result_RERI %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(Climate_meta_result_RERI) <- c("smd","ci.lb","ci.ub","I2","RR(95% CI)","pval")
rownames(Climate_meta_result_RERI) <- c(paste(RERI_event[1]," Q", 1:3, sep=""),paste(RERI_event[2]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(RERI_event[3]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(RERI_event[4]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(RERI_event[5]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(RERI_event[6]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(RERI_event[7]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(RERI_event[8]," Q",1:3, sep=""),
                               paste(RERI_event[9]," Q",1:3, sep=""),paste(RERI_event[10]," Q",1:3, sep=""))
Climate_meta_result_RERI
```
